title: Malaxis hoppii

taxonomy: Malaxis hoppii is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Malaxis, which is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification places Malaxis hoppii within the larger kingdom of plants, specifically the division Magnoliophyta. At the rank of order, it is classified as Asparagales, and at the class level, it is a member of the class Liliopsida. This classification helps to identify and distinguish Malaxis hoppii from other species within the orchid family.
